Class Library

java.lang.Object
Library
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Library extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a user's media library that stores and manages media entries. Relationships: - Has a collection of MediaEntry objects using an ArrayList. - Manages MediaEntry objects and its subclasses. - Is serializable, allowing the library and its contents to be saved and loaded.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Library()
    Constructs an empty Library.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addEntry(MediaEntry entry)
    Adds a media entry to the library.
    void
    displayEntries()
    Displays all media entries stored in the library.
    void
    displayEntriesByMediaType(String type)
    Displays all media entries of the specified media type.
    void
    displayEntriesByStatus(Status status)
    Displays all media entries with the specified status.
    void
    displaySummary()
    Displays a summary of the library which includes the total number of entries, number of planned, in-progress, and completed entries, and the user's average rating of completed entries
    MediaEntry
    getEntry(String title)
    Searches for a media entry by its title.
    void
    removeEntry(MediaEntry entry)
    Removes a media entry from the library.
    void
    retrieveEntry(MediaEntry entry)
    Displays the details of a specific media entry.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Library

      public Library()
      Constructs an empty Library. Initializes the collection of media entries.

  • Method Details

    • getEntry

      public MediaEntry getEntry(String title)
      Searches for a media entry by its title.
      Parameters:
      title - the title of the media entry to search for
      Returns:
      the matching MediaEntry if found; otherwise, null

    • addEntry

      public void addEntry(MediaEntry entry)
      Adds a media entry to the library.
      Parameters:
      entry - the MediaEntry to add

    • removeEntry

      public void removeEntry(MediaEntry entry)
      Removes a media entry from the library.
      Parameters:
      entry - the MediaEntry to remove

    • retrieveEntry

      public void retrieveEntry(MediaEntry entry)
      Displays the details of a specific media entry.
      Parameters:
      entry - the MediaEntry to retrieve and display

    • displayEntries

      public void displayEntries()
      Displays all media entries stored in the library. However, if the library is empty, a message is displayed.

    • displayEntriesByStatus

      public void displayEntriesByStatus(Status status)
      Displays all media entries with the specified status.
      Parameters:
      status - the status used to filter media entries

    • displayEntriesByMediaType

      public void displayEntriesByMediaType(String type)
      Displays all media entries of the specified media type.
      Parameters:
      type - the media type used to filter entries

    • displaySummary

      public void displaySummary()
      Displays a summary of the library which includes the total number of entries, number of planned, in-progress, and completed entries, and the user's average rating of completed entries
